title: The Straw Hats Reach Egghead
description: On pages 0–2, this part focuses on Kid, Unknown person #1, Luffy, Dorry, Sanji, Unknown person #2 as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: VEGAPUNK?!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: THE VEGAPUNK?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What a fracas...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Vegapunk! You're like my role model!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I killed two years in your hometown, baldmore!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After goin' through your lab, there was still a load of stuff I didn't get a chance to look into!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: It's the giant mech of my dreams....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just how many times bigger than general frankly is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't wait to show Luffy and Chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What a stunning lady!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just a moment! This is the first I've heard of vegapunk being a woman,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And she looks far too young. Vegetunk has been active for many years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Naturally! Who said this was the main "Stella" body?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're looking at punk-02! vegapunk lilith!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In any case, we always run through our research funds in a jiffy,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we'll allow you to skedaddle if you just relinquish your valuables!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What?! These waters are chilly enough without you being cold too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just fished us out, what kind of rescue do you call this?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you deaf?! This is not a rescue!!

dialogue.speaker: Kid
dialogue.text: PUNK do

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Tressing on these waters is high impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Resist, and they will sink you without question!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Take a gander at the weaponized sea-beasts!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! They just popped out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pere here

dialogue.speaker: Shaka
dialogue.text: Lilith!! What are you doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do you always insist on looting?! Have some pride as a scientist!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaka! Put a sock in it! Can your infernal pride keep the lights on?

dialogue.speaker: Lucci
dialogue.text: They're the straw hat pirates,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A newly dubbed Emperor crew are not going to merely surrender.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Precisely! They must have a heap of treasure stashed away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even so, you've made a foolish blunder.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Weaponized Sea- Beasts?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That's rad!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, but my fear is over- whitming my awe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Gya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Blunder?! I have them surrounded!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't under- estimate them... look at the swordsman.

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 38 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
